title: Collect SQS DLQ messages into canonical event records

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
As an operator, I want Caducus to collect SQS dead-letter queue messages into canonical event records, so that failed asynchronous work is visible in the anomaly radar.

Feature: SQS DLQ collection
  Scenario: Collect configured DLQ messages
    Given a Caducus configuration that enables an SQS DLQ collector
    And the collector is configured for a dead-letter queue
    When I run the Caducus collect command
    Then Caducus reads new messages from the dead-letter queue
    And Caducus writes one canonical event record per message
    And each event record preserves source-specific metadata alongside the canonical fields

  Scenario: Use the queue-based default group_id
    Given a Caducus configuration that enables an SQS DLQ collector without a group_id override
    When I collect DLQ messages
    Then Caducus writes a deterministic group_id derived from the queue identity
